name: Pay Tel Communications
message: Pay Tel Communications, Inc. specializes in providing technology solutions designed to enhance safety and efficiency within confinement facilities and support the needs of incarcerated individuals. Their product offerings include secure communication platforms, educational resources, and multi-function tablets aimed at improving the lives of detainees.The data includes:10,000+ video call recordings10,000+ audio call recordings20,000+ scans of physical mail70,000+ work-related documentsThe list of facilities affected by the breach:Alexander County NCAlleghany County Jail NCAlleghany
